settings.heading: PVC Banner Printing
settings.description: A durable, low-cost option for promotions, events, site signage and everyday advertising. Easy to order, custom sized, and available with standard finishing options.

settings.heading: Buy Now — Popular PVC Banner Sizes
settings.description: Order a standard size in seconds. Pay securely, then upload your artwork.
settings.note: 440gsm tear-resistant weatherproof PVC. Prices include eyelets. Need a different size? Get in touch for a custom quote.

settings.heading: 3m × 1m — Buy More, Save More
settings.description: Stocking up? Save when you order multiple 3m × 1m banners. Pay securely, then upload your artwork.
settings.note: Prices include eyelets. Savings shown vs. buying singles.

settings.question: What are PVC banners best used for?
settings.answer: PVC banners are ideal for shop fronts, events, market stalls, construction sites and general business advertising. They work well indoors and outdoors.

settings.question: Can I use PVC banners indoors and outdoors?
settings.answer: Yes. PVC banners are weather-resistant and durable enough for outdoor use, while also looking sharp for indoor displays.

settings.question: How do I upload artwork?
settings.answer: Use our Upload Artwork page. We accept PDF, AI, EPS, JPG and PNG files.

settings.question: Can I order a custom size?
settings.answer: Yes. Contact us with your exact dimensions and we'll quote accordingly.

settings.heading: Ready to order your PVC banner?
settings.description: Upload your artwork or get in touch for a custom quote.

settings.heading: Optional Extras & Design Services
settings.description: Add finishing options or let our team handle your artwork. Just add them to your basket alongside your order.
settings.note: Add-ons are optional and added separately to your basket.
